title: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Stock: Q1 Earnings Preview and Market Expectations
text: As SoundHound AI prepared for its Q1 2026 earnings release in early May 2026, market expectations centered on continued strong revenue growth from its core automotive and IoT business segments. Consensus expectations pointed to Q1 revenue of approximately $42.8 million, representing roughly 50% year-over-year growth. Analysts anticipated the company would report a GAAP loss per share of approximately -$0.10, reflecting continued investment in growth and technology development. The LivePerson acquisition, announced in April 2026, was expected to be a major topic in the earnings call, with investors seeking clarity on integration costs and combined entity revenue opportunities. Management was expected to reaffirm or adjust its 2026 revenue guidance of $225-260 million based on business momentum and integration plans. The company's strong cash position and absence of debt were viewed as competitive advantages allowing aggressive investment in growth initiatives.
